Blog post already written+pushed. Reviewed quality (strong). Pivoted schedule — pulling OS contribution forward to 10:15.

blocks.summary: Implemented anthropic native web search provider (#49949).
blocks.details: Implemented anthropic native web search provider (#49949). Created plugin (createTool→null pattern), payload injection wrapper (createAnthropicNativeWebSearchWrapper), config resolver for domains/maxUses/userLocation. Wired into extra-params.ts stream chain. Committed.

Dashboard architecture review. Design doc solid — confirmed static JSON + polling + vanilla JS approach. Added detailed 11-block build plan to DASHBOARD-DESIGN.md. Key decisions: separate dashboard repo, regex parsing, MVP-first (static HTML → generate.js → deploy).

Dashboard project setup. Created dashboard/ with index.html, style.css (dark theme, mobile-first, 3 breakpoints), app.js (timeline rendering, polling, detail bottom sheet), sample dashboard.json with today's real data. All core layout components in place.

Dashboard CSS polish. Redesigned timeline to dot-and-line (circular nodes + vertical connecting line). Added pulsing glow on active block, backdrop overlay for detail panel, Escape key close, smooth cubic-bezier transitions, mobile drag handle, font smoothing.

Dashboard JS refinement. Added Visibility API (pause polling when tab hidden), exponential error backoff, diff-aware rendering (skip if unchanged), arrow key navigation in detail panel, day progress bar, accessibility attrs (role/tabindex/aria-label), selected block highlight, close animation timing fix.

blocks.details: Created henry-the-frog/work-dashboard repo on GitHub, pushed dashboard code, enabled GitHub Pages (henry-the-frog.github.io/work-dashboard/). Checked notifications — PR #50001 still open, no reviews yet.

blocks.summary: generate.js v1 — parses CURRENT.md, SCHEDULE.md, daily logs into dashboard.json.
blocks.details: generate.js v1 — parses CURRENT.md, SCHEDULE.md, daily logs into dashboard.json. Handles strikethrough schedule pivots, extracts artifacts from URLs, computes mode stats, pulls recent days from memory/. Tests passing (35 blocks, 13 done). Scaffold is solid (clean HTML/CSS/JS, responsive, good polling). Identified critical gap: no generate.js yet — dashboard shows hardcoded data. Reprioritized afternoon to build data pipeline before UI polish.

blocks.summary: generate.js edge cases — fixed summary truncation (sentence detection was fooled by…
blocks.details: generate.js edge cases — fixed summary truncation (sentence detection was fooled by periods in URLs/abbreviations; added min-length + lookahead). Wrote 8 unit+integration tests with temp fixture workspaces. All passing.
